features: Contents: Amber, Red Rose, Jasmine, Cinnamon, Violet & Vanilla Gift Pack
A great alternative to fragrance oil and candles in Recyclable Packaging. Use for Prayers or Pleasure
All Stamford Incense products are Vegan (strictly no Animal testing or ingredients)
Stamford Incense contain Natural Oils which are Alcohol Free
description: Stamford Incense is produced using a legacy of over 75 years and are widely regarded as the best quality manufactured of incense in the world. The incense making tradition used to develop and produce Stamford Incense has had its formulas passed on through 3 generations of the family owned manufacturer which exports its products to 45 countries. Stamford Incense is produced by following the best practices in the industry to achieve quality and consistency in its production. The brand, Stamford was launched in 2004 to produce great value incense sticks, featuring an extensive range and all at fantastic prices. It has since grown to become one of the most recognisable incense brands in the market.
